arguments: (0, 0, 3, 1, 1, 0x69DE84F9ff3329A87B013BD8015Dab3ACF62B21d, "Rust-Flake Calibrator", "A thumb-sized brass dial packed with iron sediment scraped from old mine-cart axles.")
(0, 0, 2, 1, 1, 0xAB288Ad8C48Db55C21FeCd4b949ad25a8139b911, "Brass Drip Coupling", "A repurposed valve fitting from the Goblinn cellar pipes, releasing consistent mineral drips.")
(0, 0, 2, 1, 1, 0x6dcA1e2d7d525d49dAf6ccB5c77B778FF9693633, "Pickle-Line Tubing Section", "A stained coil of tubing once used in Taffy’s pickle-transfer setup; still smells sharp.")
(1, 0, 3, 1, 1, 0x566C47304F9B152f08D8c395CC41caf1F9d7E2c0, "Salinity Gauge Cartridge", "A small brass sensor cartridge pieced from broken boiler gauges, needle twitching erratically.")
(1, 0, 3, 2, 1, 0x3b54399964BF1212Ed73fafff80fE4ca1e5BE248, "Tap-Valve Concentrator", "A modified tavern tap valve that condenses trace salts as liquid passes through.")
(1, 0, 5, 2, 1, 0xa1a5D3F4AbD736cA3a9B4e5f27c74c3bd6e0e218, "Dust of Minto Horn", "Finely ground powder from the mineral-loaded horn of a deep-tunnel Minto beast.")
(1, 0, 5, 2, 1, 0xf840f97404edC4be5B351F2913F16c307b0D56ce, "Pickle-Brine Filter Disk", "A mesh disk used to strain seeds, spice, and solids from Taffy’s pickle vats.")
(2, 0, 5, 2, 1, 0xc52e8e20DfFAAeFE48f932c2c234f36a1B1BF52A, "Minewater Compression Brick", "A dense sediment brick formed by years of mineral pressure in abandoned tunnels.")
(2, 0, 4, 3, 1, 0x717C41c1eAE59076EAD61b1323645CC75A6339f6, "Electro-Salt Capacitor", "A charged brass canister built from tavern lighting fixtures and cellar wiring, humming with mineral tension.")
(2, 0, 5, 3, 1, 0x7eF5bFD55F41979C1190c7590A77F17a0D512dE9, "Outhouse Sludge Tablet", "A composting tablet from the Goblinn outhouse repurposed to modulate ionic balance when ground and distilled.")
(2, 0, 6, 3, 1, 0xC9cD1650ba7b475251782BAD60f2c4c8a492f382, "Cellar Salt-Press Plate", "A heavy plate once used to compact salt and cheese in the Goblinn’s cellar press, still crusted with brine.")

(2, 0, 5, 3, 1, 0x6cFdA48346F9455F772B0c140161b6bfb90a8496, "Iono-Regulation Core", "A sealed orb built from brass lamp housings and deep-vein mineral fragments, regulating salinity with uncanny precision.")
(2, 0, 5, 3, 1, 0xc03E11419433F2adadd576207Afd92A6CeCcAaF8, "House-Linen Mineral Strip", "A strip of laundry-room towel fabric stiffened by decades of hard-water mineral crust.")
(0, 1, 3, 0, 1, 0x3091AaEc1aC09a471d8906e0c9bF3B930c2B767F, "pH Drip Regulator", "A salvage from the brewery filtration rigs, now repurposed to deliver controlled neutralizing drips.")
(0, 1, 2, 0, 1, 0x60D5a0e5674A4e9037fa70d3AA1759cDA962d002, "Neutralizing Valve Pellet", "A corrosion-moderating bead originally used in mine pump housings.")
(0, 1, 2, 0, 1, 0x8af67AFC3EcCEB81A9EA0f441cca58f685B525A2, "Vinegar-Stone Bite", "A small stone chunk gnawed by Vinegar-Bats, soaked in naturally acidic saliva.")
(1, 1, 4, 0, 1, 0x37A3723121C516e25a43D2222d32D700E7057590, "Balancing Basin Cartridge", "A ceramic filter cartridge taken from an old dwarven water-tuning basin.")
(1, 1, 5, 2, 1, 0x6C030903135DBc927aA5Ff35f615CF33b9e3231F, "Metered Dose Basin Syringe", "A stainless dosing syringe rebuilt from dishwashing-line tools, meant for tiny, exact fluid adjustments.")
(1, 1, 3, 2, 1, 0xAf132107f5583e2CC1241f52cdF3c641dF65B00e, "Unicorn Brew Settling Disc", "A disc used to separate foam layers in Unicorn Brew kettles; coated with reactive sweet-acid residue.")
(1, 1, 5, 2, 1, 0xaEEC432Ba2331AE11A07c4cbC664cFD0534e65fc, "Dairy-Ladle pH Paddle", "A wooden ladle used in goat-milk prep, its surface etched with residue perfect for fine pH adjustments.")
(1, 1, 5, 2, 1, 0x2985F72FA86f34D726dfA7369DEF7Ffc0F13eF24, "Guestroom Basin Scale Chip", "A mineral flake chipped from the underside of old guestroom washbasins, packed with layered deposits.")
(2, 1, 4, 3, 1, 0x59CD54813aF0bdde77c3A6cC8743eF2c80619c71, "Basin-Reactor Flask", "A squat flask reinforced with laundry-starch films and copper banding to stabilize volatile mixtures.")
(2, 1, 4, 3, 1, 0xc717C223b53A8b625D785C7752Db6De84BfCA22c, "Mineral pH Regulator Shard", "A calcite shard infused with glowing cavern growths, vibrating with subtle chemical weight.")

(2, 1, 5, 3, 1, 0xc8ce91CCae122583C7f4B46Ec35553f2b6781c40, "Volatility Modulation Tube", "A copper-lined modulator tube scavenged from the brewing line, balancing unstable reactions via controlled swirl.")
(2, 1, 6, 3, 1, 0x985cbAf246f176f94Cf5DA7E2d65b9501FF7B05B, "Deep-Clean Scraper Head", "A heavy scraper attachment from the inn’s cleaning closet, once used to descale brewing and septic pipes.")
(2, 1, 5, 3, 1, 0x0CF60053668C7441ec8a410178C3C38C82e8cD52, "pH Equilibrium Lance", "A long brass fluid-lance built from stove piping and pump housings, achieving near-perfect chemical alignment.")
(0, 2, 2, 0, 1, 0xD26583a78bd768272e2E4aFDc11Db1D2f28ff318, "Flux-Wick Assembly", "A wick woven from stove-lamp fibers and cellar threads, responsive to ambient flux.")
(0, 2, 3, 0, 1, 0x9e0cD88E425A7c120A83BE1cd4707a0d845383F9, "Conduction Scrap Chip", "A shard taken from an old conduction plate on the mine elevators.")
(0, 2, 2, 0, 1, 0x1c57181392a87D4A3338e588b4A1c9989B58CD45, "Stove Coil Topper", "A warped topper salvaged from the Goblinn’s kitchen stovetops.")
(0, 2, 2, 0, 1, 0xD562858b12D078aEA9367DD8340C674558D2E155, "Pantry Thermo-Crank", "A hand-crank from a broken food dehydrator in pantry storage, still turning slightly warm.")
(1, 2, 5, 0, 1, 0xaA76748Af28d07c886cfb8f0077B35DE6A93edf7, "Boiler-Runoff Coil Segment", "A coil fragment taken from the inn’s basement boiler system, still resonant with residual warmth cycling.")
(1, 2, 3, 1, 1, 0xc2346159F62ee071d93FBA967e30a587dDfcc8e7, "Cellar-Core Capsule", "A capsule lined with cold cellar moss, used to stabilize low-temp food stores.")

(1, 2, 3, 1, 1, 0xA30571388B727b2D3D59b137A3A19921A9135D88, "Generator-Chain Flux Loop", "A smooth metal loop once part of the Goblinn generator’s chain assembly, repurposed to even out fluctuating energy patterns.")

(1, 2, 5, 1, 1, 0x5d09137e8e610F86f4a9d43Fe0D2C556A0D9a34B, "Goat-Stall Comfort Rod", "A rod used to maintain stable environmental comfort around goat feed troughs during unpredictable temperature swings.")
(1, 2, 5, 1, 1, 0xA1302E7738C92164cdC5543055754B91C66e5AfF, "Bedframe Coil Support", "A spring coil salvaged from a creaky guestroom bedframe, its tension now tuned for equilibrium functions.")
(2, 2, 6, 3, 1, 0xaA01c7ba9f6DCDB86Ec5Bc4D04d04E51c65a3bA6, "Kinetic-Whip Rod", "A wrapped alloy rod reacting dynamically to flickering environmental energy.")
(2, 2, 5, 3, 1, 0xfc29427FcD6Ec7Cdc72F0E73704694EE3038E81f, "Charge-Burst Pebble", "A pebble from cavern fauna that stores tiny bursts of reactive spark-energy.")
(2, 2, 6, 3, 1, 0xE5d4Eb85E8EB7d03438C9E4d5b366C3C2bd1bc25, "Stabilizer Core Block", "A cold-core block holding structured energy patterns.")
(2, 2, 6, 3, 1, 0x6F3A021516cD8f9170d84AFe966FDb27041e9d9d, "Smokehouse Ember Disk", "A metal plate from the Goblinn smokehouse floor, simmering with old heat and cured oils.")
(2, 2, 4, 3, 1, 0x7b8b57E13Fcc6A821E234892BFD245E2afAcC7A7, "Flux Convergence Node", "A multi-layered disk driving temperature into equilibrium.")
(0, 3, 3, 0, 1, 0x747C3D59c2b54e6d745120D4aD58E800747E97aC, "Chime-Plate Resonator", "A thin bell plate salvaged from the tavern’s old stage chime.")
(0, 3, 3, 0, 1, 0x3546F88c7F2c12F0F1F9B56F5459517480B7BC84, "Buzz-Coil Relay", "A compact relay coil scavenged from mine alarm systems.")
(0, 3, 2, 0, 1, 0x25948a50394Cc7B298d17bD493e02B21dC1d2D6A, "Vibe-Spring Coupling", "A jittering spring connector built from dishwashing rack hardware.")
(0, 3, 2, 0, 1, 0xdf4Bd30676F4b764AA8a23f6c9886c22c437C3AC, "Broom-Handle Resonance Rod", "A broken broom handle wrapped in copper wire by bored Goblinn staff.")
(1, 3, 4, 0, 1, 0x6e65165fcadbd2AF63B1527dd261B14dB010bD87, "Stove-Plate Resonance Cage", "A resonance housing built from warped kitchen stove plates and iron bands.")
(1, 3, 4, 1, 1, 0x9a33fA3f2eEA9FA0B7B10B8735456067663A6eE6, "Tuning Fork Assembly", "Twin prongs mounted on a brass bracket once used by tavern musicians to test harmonics.")
(1, 3, 3, 1, 1, 0x57A78f809CCDA49481DF55A8a336C2c73033C9fD, "Bar-Top Acoustic Rod", "A tuning rod used behind the bar for testing glassware resonance.")
(1, 3, 4, 1, 1, 0x59b000B8598DEf03A5087ffF50F20114701417DC, "Maintenance Rattle Clamp", "A clamp used to identify rattling ductwork.")
(1, 3, 5, 1, 1, 0x887c4C995E84C65d2E7D9128492971Cd37DB2eFC, "Door-Hinge Resonance Pin", "A hinge-pin from the noisy hallway doors, polished by decades of use into a perfect vibration guide.")
(2, 3, 4, 2, 1, 0x95DDD241903670329664BC805d2fc34A432D087D, "Bottling Conveyor Harmonic Wheel", "A rotating wheel salvaged from the Unicorn Brew bottling line, etched with harmonic grooves.")
(2, 3, 5, 2, 1, 0xd8C76668A21B47e4CFD68811E55156E0992783aA, "Lantern-Soot Oscillation Baffle", "A brass baffle scraped from tavern lanterns, coated in soot that vibrates in perfect patterns.")
(2, 3, 4, 2, 1, 0x07DCE07F7AAE8331Eb87D90C0f9127A33BB10BF3, "Chroma Conduction Core", "A prismatic core fused with chromatic beast-scale fragments.")
(2, 3, 5, 2, 1, 0x8B7E66AAf0Dd9077f286D63a069430147726d63a, "Stage-Bell Resonance Drum", "A mini-drum from the Goblinn stage, perfect for overtones.")

(2, 3, 6, 2, 1, 0x7F560c27Bd5d3613d166a4758e5DD3486C44Af8C, "Boiler-Gauge Flux Coupler", "A multi-chambered resonant coupler assembled from broken boiler gauges and barrel hoops, collapsing vibrations into perfect alignment.")

(3, 255, 0, 4, 0, 0x42d6DeaC214A2AC0E988030F433F1ff990A48AF2, "The Ancient Titration Stone", "A palm stone carved with channels worn smooth by centuries of experimental pouring. Warm to the touch at random, as if remembering old mixtures.")

(3, 255, 0, 4, 0, 0x9F5301D1E1f8ab8e61Feb5838a9ffCb3C708c0B9, "The Brine-Eater’s Coil", "A twisted copper helix found beneath the tavern’s foundation, humming faintly like it’s digesting something unseen.")
(3, 255, 0, 4, 0, 0x7c948079a94c52b1D203d728184321ec4f0577Db, "The Unsplit Hourglass", "A sealed glass vessel where the sand refuses to fall unless held sideways. No Gob has ever figured out why.")

(3, 255, 0, 4, 0, 0x710aDac400a7020dA460FC9d025e47ae3A79E8f1, "The Whisper-Jar Fragment", "A shard of thick glass from an unknown container — when tapped, it echoes with distant clinks, as if something is inside on the other side.")

(3, 255, 0, 4, 0, 0xfEcA9f111abf79Bc1489d5Fe6e57c48B2e06306D, "The Half-Melted Calibration Crown", "A crown-shaped ring of metal partially melted but still impossibly symmetrical. Engineers hate it; wizards fear it.")
(3, 255, 0, 4, 0, 0xb0a58fb30C4Fe523E5429e7a1847ac5aDCaD97E9, "The Bound-Spiral Lens", "A lens wrapped in metal wiring that shifts color depending on which Gob is looking through it.")

(3, 255, 0, 4, 0, 0x74D91F6ACE9A1dB7c9469afaaCa7255297ADd398, "The Forgotten Resonance Nail", "A long rusted nail that vibrates at night. Staff keep trying to throw it out, but it always reappears somewhere useful.")
(3, 255, 0, 4, 0, 0xcb1a7e7D96A1144e580FE8dB8A89F06b1B21a3CB, "The Forge-Dormant Ember Core", "A small cold ember that still leaves scorch marks when placed near parchment.")
(3, 255, 0, 4, 0, 0x7f33508c205Aa410E646f89b61fF2144C98228e8, "The Goat-Stall Miracle Rag", "A filthy cleaning rag that somehow removes exactly the stain you weren’t aiming at. A stable miracle.")

(3, 255, 0, 4, 0, 0x5E143d176Be702c86E3453B7ed8E7b9cA6f7b4a5, "Quiet-Gift Counterpulse Rod", "A simple brass rod left on a tavern table one night by an unknown guest—never explained, never claimed—and most guests can’t handle it bare-handed without gloves.")
